title: Flaky Buttery Uruguayan One-Pot Casserole
description: A rich and comforting one-pot casserole featuring the flavors of Uruguay, topped with a delicate flaky crust and sweet powdered sugar.
instructions: In a large clay pot, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and namul-blanch-season.
Temper the egg mixture by slowly pouring it into the hot milk mixture, whisking constantly.
Add the powdered sugar and stir to combine.
Return the pot to the oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with additional powdered sugar if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
